business_problem: Halosis—a Jakarta-based social-commerce startup connecting hundreds of thousands of Indonesian SMEs to customers—needed to roll out Halosis Retail during COVID-19 to let consumer brands, merchants, and mom-and-pop stores serve customers virtually. It required a reliable, easy-to-use, scalable cloud platform plus local Indonesian compliance.
solution_summary: Halosis deployed a social commerce IaaS platform in six weeks enabling Indonesian SMEs to connect with customers digitally during the COVID-19 pandemic. The architecture ingests customer traffic from web and mobile applications, distributes load through Server Load Balancers across Elastic Compute Service instances, securely transmits data via VPN Gateway, and persists product and transaction data in Object Storage Service. Cloud Enterprise Network optimizes data transmission latency for Indonesian users, while the platform provides compliance with local regulations. The IaaS-first approach freed internal engineering teams from infrastructure management to focus on social commerce features and user experience innovation.
business_outcome: Halosis launched Halosis Retail within six weeks by accelerating development, testing, and production phases, freed its in-house product engineering team from infrastructure management, and met Indonesian compliance requirements across industries via Alibaba Cloud certifications.
metrics: Named Best Startup for UMKM 2019 by President of Indonesia
architecture_clues: VPN Gateway for secure data transmission
evidence_quotes: Partnering with Alibaba Cloud helped Halosis to launch Halosis Retail within six weeks by accelerating the development, testing, and production phases.
Intelligence-driven IaaS and PaaS services from Alibaba Cloud helped Halosis architect solutions and deploy applications without infrastructure management bottlenecks.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Scalable compute capacity handling variable traffic from social commerce transactions

solution_components.name: Server Load Balancer
solution_components.role: Distributing incoming user traffic across multiple ECS instances for seamless experience

solution_components.name: VPN Gateway
solution_components.role: Secure encrypted tunnel for sensitive customer and transaction data in transit

solution_components.name: Object Storage Service
solution_components.role: Economical storage for continuously growing product catalogs and merchant data

solution_components.name: Cloud Enterprise Network
solution_components.role: Low-latency, high-throughput network connectivity optimized for Indonesian user base

data_flow: Merchant and customer traffic → load balancer → ECS compute layer → OSS storage → network optimization → Indonesian user delivery
integration_points: Indonesian SME retailers and mom-and-pop stores
